title: 2 Free Echo Container Images | CVE-free, automatically patched & hardened
description: Eliminate the CVE chase with 8 months of access to two of Echo's secure-by-design container images that are automatically patched and hardened for you. Built to be a drop-in replacement for vulnerable base images.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: 2 Free Echo Container Images | CVE-free, automatically patched & hardened
